ModMetadata.Name: Entropy.Processor
ModMetadata.Description: [h1]Entropy.Processor[/h1] Integrated Circuit processor replacement for Stationeers. Has better performance and supports easy extensibility. Discussion: [url=https://discord.com/channels/1370137389837717545/1476117082906296451]Discord[/url] Source code: [url=https://github.com/Aberro/Entropy]Github[/url] [b]WARNING:[/b] This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: [url=https://github.com/StationeersLaunchPad/StationeersLaunchPad]StationeersLaunchPad Github page[/url]
ModMetadata.InGameDescription: Entropy.Processor Integrated Circuit processor replacement for Stationeers. Has better performance and supports easy extensibility. Discussion: Discord Source code: Github WARNING: This is a StationeersLaunchPad Plugin Mod. It requires Bepinex to be installed with the StationeersLaunchPad plugin. See: StationeersLaunchPad Github page
ModMetadata.ChangeLog: [h1]Update v1.0.0.456 to v1.0.0.458[/h1] [list] [*] Fixed auto-version incrementing and changelog generation. [/list]
